headline: Pilgrim's Pride Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Sales Grow About 1.6% Y/Y
summary: PPC misses earnings estimates as margins weaken, but Prepared Foods growth and Just Bare's momentum support sales and long-term expansion efforts.

raw.headline: Pilgrim's Pride Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Sales Grow About 1.6% Y/Y

headline: Altria Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Rise 3.2% Y/Y
summary: MO's first-quarter results top estimates with earnings and revenue growth, driven by strong smokeable performance and pricing gains.

headline: Hershey Q1 Earnings Top Estimates on Pricing-Led Sales Growth
summary: Hershey's Q1 EPS and sales beat estimates as pricing fuels double-digit revenue growth despite volume softness and margin pressure.

raw.headline: Hershey Q1 Earnings Top Estimates on Pricing-Led Sales Growth

headline: Service Corporation Q1 Earnings Miss on Lower Funeral Volumes
summary: SCI Q1 EPS lags estimates as funeral volumes normalize from last year's flu season. Pricing, cost control and strong cemetery preneed help lift revenues.

raw.headline: Service Corporation Q1 Earnings Miss on Lower Funeral Volumes

headline: Hershey (HSY) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
summary: Hershey (HSY) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +14.43% and +2.50%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

raw.headline: Hershey (HSY) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
raw.summary: Hershey (HSY) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +14.43% and +2.50%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: Pilgrim's Pride (PPC) Lags Q1 Earnings Estimates
summary: Pilgrim's Pride (PPC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -25.55% and +0.73%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
